item.title: neurotoxins
item.description: source: https://www.reddit.com/r/science/comments/1ki656o/people_living_within_a_mile_of_a_golf_course_had/https://www.reddit.com/r/science/comments/1ki656o/people_living_within_a_mile_of_a_golf_course_had/ https://www.psychiatrist.com/news/golf-course-living-linked-to-higher-parkinsons-risk/ There are much safer options for golf courses to use, it should be law they must adhere to organic farm standards. Stuff like soap, vitamin d, and small amounts of copper are not the same as these industrial agricultural pesticides: https://www.agdaily.com/technology/the-list-of-pesticides-approved-for-organic-production/ And for that matter, these pesticides should be banned in agriculture too. Organic farming is superior to industrial agriculture, and can feed everybody just fine: https://www.wsj.com/articles/SB10001424127887323374504578217601897610528. For anyone interested, GMO’s and Science: Scientists are reporting suppression of scientific data and are calling for a law mandating transparency of study results: https://imgur.com/a/yeb2l4f
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

item.title: 8 weeks clean from selfharm
item.description: Feeling both very strong, and very weak. Feel so sure I am truly done this time, but also find myself in moments where I feel like just giving up.
item.dc:creator: dotnote

item.title: Progress - normal BMI!
item.description: I’m the poster child of why BMI is a wonky measurement. I’m now theoretically at a normal BMI but I still wear a size XL/16/46 and I still have significant abdominal obesity. But I won’t lie, it feels good to have passed that first huge barrier and technically not being obese or overweight anymore. Reality is different and ”normal weight” definitely (unfortunately ?) isn’t the same as skinny. I wish! I’ll take my wins where I can get them though! This is still a significant milestone.
item.dc:creator: ssmc

item.title: Deviousness Day 154
item.description:
it is friday yay! I hope everyone is having a good friday and has an amazing weekend!
those dont look like very good praise things on there. dont think it would motivate me.
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share artwork! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We will be doing DnD things in the future here shortly. Will be interesting. So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I am changing how I add people to my ping list so please see here to get added or removed: https://imgur.com/a/fFYOR2B there is now the option on desktop to follow when someone posts so feel free to do that and lemme know and I can remove you from the ping list. I dont think I will get rid of it entirely so if you prefer the special feeling of getting a ping it will also continue to be an option. #deliciousness #potato #memes #deviousness
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Happy Birthday Litterbox! [OC]
item.description:
7yrs ago today I posted this comic -but unbeknownst to me, things actually started 3yrs earlier with the birth of our first boy. He was not thrilled about being a baby and going from a happy couple to sleep deprived three was hard for us all. As a coping mechanism I started keeping notes about the ups and downs as the long days flew past. Three years and another baby later, I was still writing my notes, but they were getting funnier as the kids grew. One such note was my oldest very confidently sharing his Lightning McQueen anatomy fact -although luckily for me, just while he was brushing his teeth! Now here we are 7yrs later with over 300 comics, a book and an animated pilot on the way! Absolutely incredible!! Thanks so much to you all for sharing this journey with me! I can’t wait to show you what we’re cooking up for the pilot -and after that? Let’s find out together!
BONUS Panel!
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics

item.title: It's time for Funny Friday! End the week with some laughs
item.description:
Hey there, it's time for a quick Funny Friday to end the work week. As always, check in the comments below for a link to some bonus material in a private folder so it doesn't scandalize the mods, and if you want to be pinged when I do one of these posts, let me know in the comments. Now on with the laughs!
Can you be my girl-foe in an enemies to lovers scenario? (And yes, that is Devora Wild, voice of Lae'zel, doing the audio)
This might be a rare fourth degree burn. That went right down to the bone.
If you know, you know.
Definitely rolled a natural 20 on that perception check.
I'm in this picture and I don't like it. (Although at least I do look pretty young for my age)
Shinji is in SO much danger.
They're all stealing from each other.
Unless maybe it's a LOTR theme wedding.
My dog crossed the rainbow bridge in 2023, so this is the closest you get to a dog tax. Hope you had some laughs and have a great weekend.
item.dc:creator: PoliticalWanderer

item.title: What Happened Today #98
item.description: When Supreme Court justices break their typical silence to defend democracy, we're beyond normal politics. It's happened four times in the past three months, a shocking public display for the usually taciturn jurists. Trump's systematic purging of officials who won't bend to his will reveals an administration that demands absolute loyalty over competence or truth. Today he fired the Librarian of Congress and the acting FEMA director. He also attacked the Fed Chair again, calling him "a fool" for not reducing interest rates. Don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of https://www.govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/vance-india-pakistan 2. https://go.govbrief.today/us-uk-trade-deal 3. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-powell-fool+ 4. https://go.govbrief.today/vance-powell-wrong 5. https://go.govbrief.today/noaa-database-archived 6. https://go.govbrief.today/admin-upenn-donations 7. https://go.govbrief.today/defense-moves-transgender 8. https://go.govbrief.today/russia-wants-territory 9. https://go.govbrief.today/martin-nomination-pulled 10. https://go.govbrief.today/pirro-us-attorney 11. https://go.govbrief.today/patel-fbi-budget 12. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-fire-fema-head 13. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-humanitarian-deport 14. https://go.govbrief.today/cbp-pregnancy-infants 15. https://go.govbrief.today/south-african-arrival 16. https://go.govbrief.today/doroudi-leaving-us 17. https://go.govbrief.today/dems-block-crypto-bill 18. https://go.govbrief.today/roberts-fight-excesses 19. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-fires-librarian-congress 20. https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-probe-james 21. https://go.govbrief.today/leo-critical-vance 22. https://go.govbrief.today/cadwalader-losting-lawyers 23. https://go.govbrief.today/mauritshuis-museum-reevaluating 24. https://go.govbrief.today/sotomayor-stand-up

item.title: It's been 3 years since OP shared, and things have gotten dramatically worse. Just yesterday, the DoD began the process of removing 1,000 trans soldiers from our military. Others have been given 30 days to self-identify.
item.description: "No More Trans @ DoD. [...] No more pronouns." -US Secretary of Defense, Pete Hegseth The full AP story (via PBS): https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/up-to-1000-transgender-troops-are-being-separated-from-the-military-in-new-pentagon-order
item.dc:creator: joysuck

item.title: Have some memes - Dune edition!
item.description:
Christmas, this early? My bad
It's stuck in my head now
Love when he makes that face
*squeeze*
UWU
This one's a bit old
This one is also old
item.dc:creator: redheadedrobot

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1355 (cheese rave)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Had a shitty dream where America was poised on the edge of nuclear war with Canada and that someone slammed the button just as the alarm woke me up, so THAT'S nice.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: (absolute silence) ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
